# ProgressRing

**Status:** Experimental  
**Category:** inputs  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `spinner-container`, `spinner-wrapper`, `spinner`, `spinner-text`, `spinner-percentage`

Indeterminate progress spinner.

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { ProgressRing } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### ProgressRing

```js
return new ProgressRing({ text: "Loading model…" });
```
